jobTitle: Head of Talent & Culture / Senior Executive Development Manager
jobDescription: YOUR PROFILEYou have successfully completed your studies in Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field You have substantial work experience in fast-moving environments such as start-ups or consulting and/or at least 6 years of working experience in HR, ideally in executive development You have prior leadership experience and enjoy developing your team You have excellent communication skills in English; additional German language skills are a plus You are open-minded, assertive, eloquent, hands-on and empathetic YOUR RESPONSIBILITIESAs Head of Talent & Culture / Senior Executive Development Manager at Raisin, you are responsible for two of the key drivers of our company’s success - Raisin’s culture and employees. The position is a maternity leave replacement and limited to one year but with a good chance of prolongation afterwards. Leading, coaching and developing a very motivated Talent & Culture team consisting of ten team members Ensuring the smooth running of our different line duties within the team and sparring for the team members in: Talent Acquisition, People Operations, Training and Development, Employer Branding, Office Management as well as project work Conducting and running our executive training format as well as sparring for our managers and team leads  OUR BENEFITSBe part of a diverse team of more than 34 different nationalities, who strongly believes in agile cross-functional methods, collaboration and appreciation in our daily work. We are professional and work hard to always be the best in our field. You find us in our open office in beautiful Prenzlauer Berg well connected to public transport and surrounded by a great variety of restaurants and supermarkets. Relocation and visa support as well as a relocation reimbursement Personal training budget of 1,700 € and four full training days Free choice of hardware Beginner German classes directly at the office and financial support for acquiring a language certificate Hungry all the time? Breakfast, snacks, daily fresh fruit as well as drinks are provided Stay up to date at regular townhall sessions with our founders and feel free to ask any kinds of questions Flexible working hours, home office and 28 vacation days Enjoy more than 50+ different sports with Urban Sports Club: We subsidize your membership with more than 20 € per month We offer you a company pension scheme ( Betriebliche Altersvorsorge), which we support with 20 % Enjoy yearly company retreats to exciting European cities and other team events, such as Lunch Lottery, Tech Lunch, Xletix and Raisin Ladies Events
